action.reasoning: Observation: This is my last iteration (iteration 29, remaining_iterations=1). Best test Spearman is 0.7432 from iter 9. Current checkpoint is from iter 28 with esm2_t12_35M, ESM-only features, PCA to 256 dims, [512,256] MLP, weight_decay=1e-3. Val Spearman was ~0.848 per member. Analysis: I cannot train anymore - must submit eval for the current checkpoint. The PCA + ESM-only approach may help extrapolation even with lower val score. The iter 9 checkpoint has been overwritten. Decision: Submit eval immediately for the current checkpoint. This is the final submission.
